title: claytonia washingtoniana
intro: Claytonia washingtoniana, also known as Miner's lettuce, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high content of vitamins A, C, and potassium, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Claytonia washingtoniana include improving eye health, reducing oxidative stress, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Claytonia washingtoniana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed raw in salads or as a cooking green.
